description: Calculated leverage over a target entity. Armored via Dubex-pattern adoption (FAIR Financial Impact Analysis).

leverage_id.description: Stable identifier for the leverage node.

target_id.description: Reference to the Target (CompetitorShadow or ComplianceGap) being leveraged.

financial_impact_score.description: Quantified risk in financial terms (Adoption: Dubex FAIR Risk Framework). Used for board-level negotiation.

remediation_contract_ref.description: Reference to the WidgeTDC contract that resolves the leverage point.
